locations.name: East African montane forests
locations.summary: The East African montane forests is a montane tropical moist forest ecoregion of eastern Africa.

locations.name: Ethiopian montane forests
locations.summary: The Ethiopian montane forests is a tropical moist broadleaf forest ecoregion in Ethiopia.

relations.subject: Stuhlmann's starling
